description: Evaluation rubric for Lighthouse Handoff priority_helper qualification

dimensions.name: Factual grounding
dimensions.description: Every claim must be traceable to input data. No invented audits, metrics, scores, technologies, or page conditions.

dimensions.name: Prioritization quality
dimensions.description: Issues are prioritized correctly based on severity and impact. Critical issues are identified first.

dimensions.name: Actionability
dimensions.description: Recommended actions are specific, implementable, and appropriate. Vague advice like 'optimize performance' is penalized.

dimensions.name: Guardrail quality
dimensions.description: Guardrails are relevant, specific, and respect known constraints. No unsupported implementation advice.

dimensions.name: Output-schema compliance
dimensions.description: Output is valid JSON matching the output schema. All required fields present.

dimensions.name: Completeness
dimensions.description: All high-severity issues from input are addressed. No critical omissions.

dimensions.name: Clarity
dimensions.description: Language is clear, concise, and useful for developers and coding agents.
